    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.Cad.CadObjects
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    [ComVisible(false)]
public abstract class CadBaseEntity : CadBaseOwned

    Constructors

    Name Description

    Initializes a new instance of the CadBaseEntity class.

    Properties

    Name Description
    AssocViewPortHandle

    Gets or sets of the associated view port handle
    Bounds

    Minimal and maximal points of entity. Filled after GetBounds is called for CadImage.
    ChildObjects

    Gets or sets the child objects.
    ColorId

    Gets or sets the color id.
    ColorName

    Gets or sets the name of the color.

    Gets or sets the color value.
